briefdescription.para: This function is sets up Interrupt system and start it.
This function takes care HPD event.
This function takes care HPD pulse interrupt.
This function sets link line rate.
This function returns current line rate.
This function is the callback function for Access lane set request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access link qual request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access prbs error count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Test CRC Event request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.

detaileddescription.para:
pointer
to timer
MicroSeconds
to wait
None.
None. This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.
It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetUserTimerHandler driver function to set this function as the handler custom delay/sleep.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD event.

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) pulse is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD pulse.

memberdef.argsstring: (u8 line_rate, u8 lane_count, XVidC_VideoMode res_table, u8 bpc, u8 pat, u8 pat_update)
memberdef.name: start_tx

briefdescription.para: This is for Tx only mode This function will start outputting internal video pattern image Setup GT, DP, pattern and generator.

parameterdescription.para: Link rate setting for the DisplayPort transmission
Number of lanes to use for transmission
Video resolution mode from the resolution table
Pattern update flag to select video pattern

simplesect.para: This function configures the DisplayPort TX subsystem with the specified parameters, trains the link, and starts video output with the selected internal pattern generator settings.

briefdescription.para: This function will reset Tx side MMCM.
This function to check MMCM lock status.

detaileddescription.para:
None.
None.
None. This function to check MMCM lock status.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 I2CBaseAddress, u8 I2CSlaveAddress, u16 RegisterAddress, u8 Value)
memberdef.name: i2c_write_dp141

briefdescription.para: This function reads DP141 VFMC- IIC.
This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

detaileddescription.para: Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

None.
None.
None. Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

briefdescription.para: This function scans VFMC- IIC.

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 *count_track, u32 *rxMsamisc0_track, u32 *bpc_track, u32 *recv_clk_freq_track, float *recv_frame_clk_track, u32 *recv_frame_clk_int_track, int *track_count)
memberdef.name: video_change_detect

briefdescription.para: This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

detaileddescription.para: Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx

briefdescription.para: This function detects incoming video and find out video parameters Based on the parameters, set up Tx and VDMA, then start Tx output.
This function will be used when no incoming video at pass-through mode If no video, switching to internal pattern generator.
This function will send power down and power up command over AUX.
This function starts audio pattern generator.
This function stops audio pattern generator.
This function toggles HW reset line for all IP's.
This function will update and overwrite EDID color depth 10BPC will be changed to 8BPC due to design limitation.
This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Ext Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This file contains functions to configure Video Pattern Generator core.

para.preformatted:

1.00 YB 07/01/15 Initial release.

1.00 KI 07/13/17 Initial release.
